Module org.flossware.commons
Package org.flossware.commons.util

Class FileUtil

java.lang.Object
org.flossware.commons.util.FileUtil
public final class FileUtil extends Object
A file utility class supporting both legacy java.io.File and modern java.nio.file.Path APIs.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Scot P. Floess

  • Method Details

    • validatePathTraversal

      public static Path validatePathTraversal(Path path, Path baseDirectory)
      Validates that a path does not escape a base directory using path traversal. For existing files, resolves symbolic links and normalizes paths. For non-existent files, validates using normalized absolute paths.
      Parameters:
      path - the path to validate
      baseDirectory - the base directory that path must be within
      Returns:
      the normalized path if validation succeeds
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if path is null, baseDirectory is null, or path attempts to escape baseDirectory
      FileException - if there is an I/O error resolving paths
      Since:
      1.0

    • validateNoTraversalPatterns

      public static void validateNoTraversalPatterns(Path path)
      Validates that a path does not contain suspicious traversal patterns. This is a fast check that doesn't require filesystem access.
      Parameters:
      path - the path to validate
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if path contains traversal patterns
      Since:
      1.0

    • newInputStream

      public static InputStream newInputStream(Path path)
      Return an input stream for the given path using NIO.2 with symlink/hardlink protection. This method uses FileChannel to prevent symlink following and validates against hardlink attacks.
      Parameters:
      path - the path for which we desire an input stream
      Returns:
      an input stream for reading from the path
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if path is null, is a symlink, or hardlink identity changed
      FileException - if there is any problem opening the input stream
      Since:
      1.0

    • newInputStream

      public static InputStream newInputStream(Path path, Path baseDirectory)
      Return an input stream for the given path with path traversal validation.
      Parameters:
      path - the path for which we desire an input stream
      baseDirectory - the base directory that path must be within
      Returns:
      an input stream for reading from the path
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if path is null, baseDirectory is null, or path attempts to escape baseDirectory
      FileException - if there is any problem opening the input stream
      Since:
      1.0

    • newInputStream

      public static InputStream newInputStream(String pathString)
      Return an input stream for the given path string using NIO.2.
      Parameters:
      pathString - the path string for which we desire an input stream
      Returns:
      an input stream for reading from the path
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if pathString is null or empty
      FileException - if there is any problem opening the input stream
      Since:
      1.0

    • requireExists

      public static Path requireExists(Path path)
      Ensures a path exists.
      Parameters:
      path - the path to verify exists
      Returns:
      the path if it exists
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if path is null or does not exist
      Since:
      1.0

    • requireExists

      public static Path requireExists(String pathString)
      Ensures a path exists.
      Parameters:
      pathString - the path string to verify exists
      Returns:
      the Path if it exists
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if pathString is null, empty, or does not exist
      Since:
      1.0

    • requireRegularFile

      public static Path requireRegularFile(Path path)
      Ensures a path represents a regular file (not a directory).
      Parameters:
      path - the path to verify is a regular file
      Returns:
      the path if it is a regular file
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if path is null, does not exist, or is not a regular file
      Since:
      1.0

    • requireDirectory

      public static Path requireDirectory(Path path)
      Ensures a path represents a directory.
      Parameters:
      path - the path to verify is a directory
      Returns:
      the path if it is a directory
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if path is null, does not exist, or is not a directory
      Since:
      1.0

    • requireReadable

      public static Path requireReadable(Path path)
      Ensures a path is readable.
      Parameters:
      path - the path to verify is readable
      Returns:
      the path if it is readable
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if path is null, does not exist, or is not readable
      Since:
      1.0

    • requireWritable

      public static Path requireWritable(Path path)
      Ensures a path is writable.
      Parameters:
      path - the path to verify is writable
      Returns:
      the path if it is writable
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if path is null, does not exist, or is not writable
      Since:
      1.0

    • getFileInputStream

      @Deprecated(since="1.22", forRemoval=true) public static FileInputStream getFileInputStream(File file)
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      Use newInputStream(Path) instead for modern NIO.2 API
      Return a file input stream for file.

      SECURITY WARNING: This method has limited path traversal protection and does not prevent TOCTOU or symlink attacks. Migrate to Path-based APIs for comprehensive security (CWE-22, CWE-367).

      Parameters:
      file - the file for whom we desire a file input stream
      Returns:
      a file input stream
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if file is null or path traversal detected
      FileException - if there is any problem creating the file input stream
      Since:
      1.0

    • getFileInputStream

      @Deprecated(since="1.22", forRemoval=true) public static FileInputStream getFileInputStream(String fileName)
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      Use newInputStream(String) instead for modern NIO.2 API
      Return a file input stream for file.
      Parameters:
      fileName - the name of the file for whom we desire a file input stream
      Returns:
      a file input stream
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if fileName is null or empty
      FileException - if there is any problem creating the file input stream
      Since:
      1.0

    • ensureFileExists

      @Deprecated(since="1.22", forRemoval=true) public static File ensureFileExists(File file)
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      Use requireExists(Path) instead for modern NIO.2 API
      Ensures a file exists.
      Parameters:
      file - the file to determine if it exists
      Returns:
      file if it exists
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if file does not exist
      Since:
      1.0

    • ensureFileExists

      @Deprecated(since="1.22", forRemoval=true) public static File ensureFileExists(String file)
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      Use requireExists(String) instead for modern NIO.2 API
      Ensures a file exists.
      Parameters:
      file - the file to determine if it exists
      Returns:
      file if it exists
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if file does not exist
      Since:
      1.0
